case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ALVIN DAWSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED AUG-31-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DAWSON, ALVIN
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME AND ADDRESS.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY TODAY'S FURNITURE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAWSON, ALVIN $23,078.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,078.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 10/7/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
